title: Smoky Silky Italian Wagyu Roast
description: A tender Wagyu roast infused with Italian herbs, grilled to smoky perfection on a cedar plank, finishing silky with a buttery glaze.
instructions: Soak the cedar plank in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning.
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat, about 375°F.
Season the Wagyu roast with salt, pepper, rosemary, thyme, garlic, and lemon zest.
Sear the roast on the grill for 2 minutes per side until a crust forms.
Transfer the seared roast onto the soaked cedar plank and close the grill lid.
Cook for 10-12 minutes, turning once, until the internal temperature reaches 135°F for medium-rare.
Remove the roast from the grill and let it rest for 10 minutes to redistribute juices.
Brush the rested roast with melted butter and pour the white wine over it for a glossy finish.
Slice the roast thinly and serve immediately.
